subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl! Upon thee be My salutation! Thou hast ever been and art remembered. There hath befallen thee that which befell the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل علیک سلامی لازال مذکور بوده و هستی بر تو وارد شد آنچه بر مظلوم وارد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
